nasb.text: He has lived in desolate cities, In houses no one would inhabit, Which are destined to become ruins.

esv.text: and has lived in desolate cities, in houses that none should inhabit, which were ready to become heaps of ruins;

cnv.text: 他住在被毀的城邑裡， 住在沒有人居住， 注定快要成為亂堆的房屋裡。

ccb.text: 他住的城邑必倾覆， 他的房屋必成为一堆瓦砾， 无人居住。
